headline: Unveiling Howmet (HWM) Q1 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Howmet (HWM), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Howmet Aerospace Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
summary: Howmet Aerospace has outperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) Shows Strong Growth and Technical Breakout Setup
summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) combines strong growth metrics with a promising technical breakout setup. With 40% EPS growth, 18% profit margins, and a defined buy-stop entry near $246.75, it offers a compelling growth opportunity.
